title: Adoption Recovery Playbook — FlowDesk Charting
body: Approved talking points: 1) Acknowledge the drop in usage and that we noticed. 2) Offer a 30-minute tailored session on Advanced Charting templates for the operations team. 3) Share the two-page quick-start and the shareable layout library. 4) Propose a 2-week check-in to confirm the team is back on track.

title: Renewal Risk Brief — CheckMate Screening
body: Approved structure for a CSM-led conversation: 1) Summarise the failed batch jobs and current support escalation status. 2) Confirm the remediation steps engineering has committed to. 3) Reinforce the value already realised this contract term. 4) Align on success criteria ahead of the renewal date.

title: Release Alert — Perpetual KYC Monitoring
body: Approved description: Perpetual KYC Monitoring is now generally available. It continuously re-screens onboarded entities and raises delta alerts with a full audit trail, reducing manual periodic reviews. You asked about continuous monitoring earlier this year — this delivers it.

title: Release Alert — AI Research Summaries
body: Approved description: AI-Generated Research Summaries are now live in FlowDesk. Generate a one-click summary of analyst research and filings to speed up your morning prep. Available now under the Research tab — no setup required.

title: Feature Tip — Case Management Collaboration
body: Approved tip: Your team can assign screening hits to multiple reviewers, add comments, and track SLAs in Case Management. Most teams cut review turnaround by sharing the load across seats rather than relying on a single reviewer.

title: Onboarding Nudge — Create Your First Watchlist
body: Approved nudge: Welcome to FlowDesk! Create your first Watchlist to track the instruments you care about — it takes under a minute and powers alerts across the app. Click 'New Watchlist' on the home screen to get started.
